title: PHASE-005: Load Testing with k6
acknowledged_by: Claude Opus 4.8 — autonomous IFC-033 build (STOA-Quality lens)
invariants_acknowledged: REAL EVIDENCE (RISK-S19-02): the deliverables are captured from an ACTUAL k6 run against a live target — no template report. load-test-report.html is a k6 web-dashboard export with real run timestamps; grafana-load-test.png is a Grafana screenshot over Prometheus remote-write; ifc-033-load-summary.json is emitted by the script's handleSummary. p95=11.6ms, error=0%, 1081 leads (~21,617/hour), 180 atomic conversions.

PROD-SAFE TARGET: the run hits a LOCAL apps/api (:4000) authenticated via the sanctioned dev-auth fallback (ALLOW_DEV_AUTH_FALLBACK=true → seeded Sarah Johnson, tenant Default Organization) against the LOCAL test DB (intelliflow_test, :5433). It NEVER touches prod Supabase — the runbook explicitly forbids load-testing prod infra.

DDD-001/002 ATOMIC PATH EXERCISED: the conversion scenario drives lead.convertToDeal — the transactionally-atomic lead→contact+account+opportunity write hardened in #621 — 180 real conversions, 0 failures, p95 ~8-12ms under concurrent ingestion.

BOTTLENECK IDENTIFIED (KPI): the binding constraint under single-user synthetic load is the per-user AUTHENTICATED rate-limit tier (1,000 req/60s, keyed by userId — rate-limit.ts:45). Driving one dev-auth user at ~26 req/s drew a uniform 36% HTTP 429; this is a harness artifact (all VUs share one userId), not a system ceiling. Real 5,000 leads/hour (1.4/s) is far below the cap; the canonical run stays within one user's budget and passes clean. Distributed multi-user headroom is IFC-047 (Sprint 22).

RLS VERIFIED SEPARATELY: tenant isolation is proven at the DB layer (non-superuser role rls_probe + app.current_tenant_id GUC → own=18, foreign=0) rather than in the perf run, because the local test DB connects as the postgres SUPERUSER which bypasses RLS by design. Policy tenant_isolation_leads is ENABLEd on leads.

ADR-018 BUDGET, NOT IFC-047: validated against the documented MVP budget (>=5,000 leads/hour, p95<200ms, err<0.1%). The aspirational 1,000-VU / p99<100ms target is explicitly IFC-047 (k6 Cloud), out of scope here.

DEPS SATISFIED: IFC-030 (Completed S17) and IFC-032 (Completed S18) — the critical path IFC-033→IFC-034 has no external blocker. IFC-033 gates IFC-034 (Gate-3 £3000 review), which is a HUMAN decision gate downstream of this task.
